title: Opening for Store Manager at MTR Foods Capital India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at MTR Foods Capital India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, MTR Foods Capital India in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MTR Foods Capital India:
MTR Foods Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MTR Foods Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
